svg.script: const width = 1200; const height = 500; const columns = 30; const spawnInterval = 5; const minSpeed = 1; const maxSpeed = 2; const chars = "01A01B01C01D01E01F01G01H01I01J01K01L01M01N01O01P01Q01R01S01T01U01V01W01X01Y01Z01a01b01c01d01e01f01g01h01i01j01k01l01m01n01o01p01q01r01s01t01u01v01w01x01y01z01"; const svgRoot = document.documentElement; function createFallingChar(x) { const textEl = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "text"); textEl.setAttribute("x", x); textEl.setAttribute("y", "-20"); textEl.setAttribute("fill", "limegreen"); textEl.setAttribute("font-family", "monospace"); textEl.setAttribute("font-size", "16"); const randomChar = chars[Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length)]; textEl.textContent = randomChar; svgRoot.appendChild(textEl); const speed = Math.random() * (maxSpeed - minSpeed) + minSpeed; function fall() {const currentY = parseFloat(textEl.getAttribute("y")); if (currentY > height + 50) {svgRoot.removeChild(textEl); return;} textEl.setAttribute("y", currentY + speed); requestAnimationFrame(fall);} requestAnimationFrame(fall);} const columnSpacing = width / columns;setInterval(() => {const randomColumn = Math.floor(Math.random() * columns); const xPos = randomColumn * columnSpacing; createFallingChar(xPos);}, spawnInterval);
